realtime.body: Place bids instantly with live updates and notifications

verified.title: Verified Sellers
verified.body: All sellers are verified with a full rating system

secure.title: Secure Payments
secure.body: 100% free to use for private sellers and buyers with no hidden fees

welcome.label: Exclusive Auctions
welcome.heading: The Premier Marketplace for Exceptional Automobiles
welcome.body: Discover a curated selection of luxury, classic, and high-performance vehicles. Our platform connects discerning buyers with verified sellers across Scandinavia — with live bidding, transparent pricing, and complete buyer protection.

brands.label: Leading Marques
brands.heading: The Finest Brands on the Market

workflow.label: How It Works
workflow.heading: Four Steps to Your Next Car
workflow.step1desc: Create your free account in minutes
workflow.step2desc: Browse and find your dream vehicle

newsletter.label: Stay Informed
newsletter.heading: Exclusive Updates, First
newsletter.body: Receive early access to premium listings, auction alerts, and Nordic automotive news.

footer.tagline: Specialized in the sale of exclusive vehicles at home and abroad. Connecting passionate buyers with exceptional automobiles since 2024.

detail.draft: This listing is a draft and not visible to other buyers.
detail.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this auction? This cannot be undone.
detail.notifyClose: Email me when this auction is closing soon
detail.acceptConfirm: Accept the highest bid and close this auction as sold?

acceptBanner.title: Reserve not met
acceptBanner.body: The highest bid was {price}. You can accept it and close the auction as sold.

bidding.signInRequired: Please sign in to place a bid
bidding.ownerCannotBid: You cannot bid on your own listing

legalDialog.title: Confirm Your Bid
legalDialog.body:
This bid is legally binding under Danish Købeloven. By confirming, you commit to purchasing the vehicle at this price if you win the auction.

Next Auction solely facilitates contact between buyer and seller and is not a party to the transaction.

antiSnipe.title: Auction Extended
antiSnipe.body: A bid was placed in the final minutes. The auction end time has been extended.

proxyBid.title: Set Proxy Bid
proxyBid.description: We'll automatically bid for you up to your maximum amount.
proxyBid.success: Proxy bid set — we'll bid for you up to {amount}

status.completedBody: This auction has ended and a winner has been selected.
status.reserveNotMetBody: The auction ended but the reserve price was not reached.

history.title: Bid History
history.empty: No bids yet. Be the first to bid!

skat.title: SKAT Compliance
skat.disclaimer: I confirm that I am selling this vehicle as a private individual (C2C) and have prepared a manual contract (slutseddel). I acknowledge that this platform is not an auctioneer and bears no liability for the vehicle's condition.
skat.upgradeRequired: Upgrade to Business (CVR) to list more than 2 cars per year.
